questions.question: What is the main difference between Inheritance and Polymorphism in Object Oriented Programming?
questions.hint: Inheritance is a mechanism that allows one class to inherit the properties of another class, while polymorphism is the ability of an object to take on multiple forms

questions.question: What is the purpose of an Abstract class in Object Oriented Programming?
questions.hint: An abstract class is a class that cannot be instantiated on its own and is designed to provide a blueprint for other classes to follow

questions.question: What is Abstraction in Object Oriented Programming?
questions.hint: Abstraction is the process of showing only the necessary details of an object or system while hiding the unnecessary details, making it easier to understand and work with
